message:
feat: add diagnostic module + export API enhancements + workflow updates

diagnostic.rs (new, 938 lines):
- Self-contained diagnostic subsystem for wa-core providing runtime
  health checks, configuration validation, and state inspection
- Covers terminal capability detection, font rendering verification,
  workspace integrity checks, and pane layout validation
- Structured DiagnosticReport output with severity levels and
  actionable recommendations

export.rs:
- Extend export API with additional format handlers and metadata
  enrichment for workspace snapshots
- Add structured error types for export failures

lib.rs:
- Register diagnostic module in the wa-core crate root

workflows.rs:
- Update workflow definitions to integrate diagnostic checkpoints

main.rs:
- Wire diagnostic CLI subcommand into the wa binary entry point
- Add --diagnostic flag for on-demand health reporting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
